subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath, through His sovereignty, revealed that which lay hidden within the breasts and the furtive glances of the eyes, even as He hath sent it down in the Qur'an [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر لسلطانه خافیه الصدور و خائنه الاعین کما انزله فی الفرقان
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @idolatry, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
